ab: harem kana wari inku i sinsi kuy adayaw mu mukuwa i zenan.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: i nani marengay i zenan sazu a pedped.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: harem kana wari inku i sinsi kuy adayaw mu mukuwa i ’uma.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: awa mi veneliyasa kana dare’?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: awa ta i iyan harem kana wari?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: i sinsi tuy adayaw ta mukuwa i zinanuman.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: awa ta i iyan harem kana wari?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: na sinsi tuy adayaw ta mukuwa i zenan.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: harem kana wari awa ta i zinanuman?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: ’azi, i sinsi tuy adayaw ta mukuwa i zenan.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: harem kana wari awa ta i zenan?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: ’azi, harem kana wari awa ta i ’uma.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: sinsi, awa ta i zinanuman mena’uwa za eman?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: awa ta mena’uwa kana tengteng.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, awa ta i zenan mena’uwa za eman?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: awa ta mena’uwa kana sirusirupan.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: mukuwa ta i ’uma kakuda ta?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: awa ta i ’uma mena’uwa kananta isalem na kudumu, kilrivak ulra a ’ivavereng zi ulra ’alrivatrengan.
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻和蜜蜂唷。
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: sinsi awa ta i zinanuman pakulimaya?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: ’azi, awa ta mena’uwa kana tengteng.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi awa ta i ’uma semalema za kulang?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: harem kana wari awa ta veneliyasa kana dare’.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: i kazu ulra a tengteng muviivii.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: harem kana wari mena’u ku kana tatena’ na vaavaaw na tengteng.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: i kaziyu ulra a sirusirupan muvaviivii.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: wa! sahar ku kana sirusirupan, salaw vulay.
en: Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: i kaziyu ulra a sirusirupan a muvaviivii.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: izu melri nu sirusirupan, ’alrivatrengan nazu.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: kazu i kani mena’una’u, amanan na mukuwa i dawilr mu!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷！
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: ai, ’azi mi awa i dawilr.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: amanan na pavekas, tawatawar kemakawang munu kurtapelra’ u.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: maranger ku za dika mena’u.
en: I want to see them right away.
